data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will edge closer to the coast of Guangdong today and tomorrow, there will be showers and thunderstorms over the region. With the trough of low pressure weakening, the weather will be brighter over the coast of southern China midweek this week. Another trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China during the Easter holidays and Ching Ming Festival.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260330","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South force 3 to 4, force 5 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.
